description: Direct, evidence-grounded interview feedback report content.

summary.description: Concise evidence-grounded overall assessment in the frozen session language.

preparednessLevel.description: Semantic readiness tier: blocking deficiency, improvable non-blocking gap, usable answer, or uniformly strong/high evidence.

dimensionAssessments.description: One to six directly assessed interview-performance dimensions.

items.description: One named report-local dimension and its direct semantic assessment.

label.description: User-facing dimension label in the frozen session language.

status.description: Direct semantic assessment status; never derive it from a numeric score.

confidence.description: Evidence directness: explicit/specific, small direct synthesis, or sparse non-negative support.

highlights.description: Zero to four positive evidence items grounded in candidate messages.

items.description: One positive evidence item with internal message anchors.

evidence.description: Concise supported observation without inventing facts or copying long source text.

confidence.description: Evidence directness for this highlight; low is allowed only for an explicitly evidence-limited non-negative observation.

sourceMessageSeqNos.description: Ascending unique sequence numbers of supporting candidate user messages.

items.description: One positive candidate user-message sequence number.

issues.description: Zero to four improvement evidence items grounded in candidate messages.

items.description: One improvement evidence item with internal message anchors.

evidence.description: Concise supported gap or limitation without inferring from an unanswered assistant prompt.

confidence.description: Evidence directness for this issue; a negative issue requires medium or high confidence.

sourceMessageSeqNos.description: Ascending unique sequence numbers of supporting candidate user messages.

items.description: One positive candidate user-message sequence number.

nextActions.description: One to two executable actions causally linked to report evidence.

type.description: Supported action type in recommendation order.

label.description: Compact user-facing action label. English: at most 24 whitespace-delimited words; zh-CN: at most 64 Unicode code points. The schema's 200 Unicode-code-point maximum is an outer malformed-output safety cap, not a writing target. A focused retry uses semicolon-separated cited missing-behavior fragments, one per selected focus code, without framing or umbrella prose.

retryFocusDimensionCodes.description: Zero to six sorted unique needs-work dimension codes; empty only for the exact single-issue answer_depth or answer_relevance generic exceptions, otherwise a retry copies every sorted unique needs-work issue code.
